headline: Is the Pepsico Turnaround Story Finally Worth Buying?
summary: Consumer staples stocks have delivered steady but unspectacular results while the broader market chased AI-fueled gains. PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP) spent 2025 navigating volume softness, pricing pushback, and one-time charges that masked underlying progress. The beverage giant delivered full-year net revenue of $93.9 billion, up 2.3% on a GAAP and 1.7% organically. Net income fell 14% to ... Is the Pepsico Turnaround Story Finally Worth Buying?
